summary:
CHURCH INITIATIVES AND MINISTRY RELOCATIONS: Brandon announces that Brandon Brim, Billye Brim's grandson, is launching a new church at the Hilton Santa Barbara Beachfront Hotel in Montecito, California. Brandon also notes a coming mass migration of Christians to areas with established histories of prayer, specifically identifying Tulsa, Oklahoma, due to the legacy of figures like Kenneth Hagin and Oral Roberts. He mentions other prayer-focused regions such as Tennessee and Mobile, Alabama, referencing Pastor John Kilpatrick. Furthermore, Brandon details upcoming relocations to Colorado Springs connected to Andrew Wommack's ministry, indicating that Wommack will assume a more prominent, elder role within faith teachings and that his ministry will double in size following the passing of another major religious figure.

INTERNATIONAL AFFAIRS AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon describes geopolitical developments involving China, stating that Xi Jinping is experiencing disruptions within his cabinet and among his top generals, raising questions about Taiwan. He mentions visions of a major spiritual revival occurring in the underground churches of China, North Korea, South Korea, the Philippines, Japan, Thailand, Vietnam, Nepal, India, Pakistan, and Afghanistan. Brandon asserts that China is highly advanced in the space race and quantum computing, claiming the United States is four years behind due to the Biden administration. He recounts seeing a green computer-like device capable of creating a dome that renders missiles and military equipment obsolete, alongside visions of massive cargo planes resembling C-17s flying military equipment at night. Brandon also discusses Iran, noting that the current regime will fall, and mentions Emmanuel Macron surrounded by cracking black surfaces and fire, associating him with the advancement of Agenda 2030, the WHO, the EU, and digital IDs.

UNITED STATES POLITICS AND GOVERNANCE: Brandon discusses domestic political figures, stating that Gavin Newsom, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Kamala Harris are associated with deep corruption involving drug cartels and police payoffs. He outlines health issues concerning various politicians, recalling past prayers for Ted Cruz's colon and liver. Brandon emphasizes that Donald Trump's presidency depend on his handling of Israel, Gaza, Greenland, and the Palestinian Authority, as well as the counsel he receives from Jared Kushner and JD Vance. Brandon describes JD Vance as a rogue agent associated with darkness, contrasting him with Marco Rubio, whom Brandon says is experiencing a positive shift and an incoming anointing. Regarding upcoming elections, Brandon predicts that the Republican Party will lose the Senate and barely retain the House of Representatives, highlighting Nevada, Arizona, and Pennsylvania as key battleground states.

SPIRITUAL VISIONS AND DOCTRINAL CONCEPTS: Brandon shares descriptions of the spirit realm, including walking beside Jesus and encountering heavenly worship characterized by blended voices, echoes upon waters, and wind carrying pink swirls and song notes. He details physical miracles he anticipates, such as the supernatural restoration of limbs, eyes, ears, noses, and teeth. Brandon discusses the concept of the believer's authority over demonic forces, referencing teachings from Kenneth E. Hagin and Billye Brim, and emphasizing the necessity of actively resisting negative forces. He also references literature by John Bevere and a book titled The Ultimate Voice. Lastly, Brandon mentions forthcoming real estate transactions, predicting that stagnant or stolen land will suddenly be sold, opening new opportunities for relocation.
rawData: [January 27, 2026]-[I saw a plan coming from Iran using Chinese military equipment]-[https://youtu.be/meR7v1cmzBI]-[Good evening, everybody. Good morning, family. Whatever you want to say, thank you for being here tonight. We're going to pray, and I'm going to go over a little bit of the stuff the Lord showed me last night in prayer, and we'll just make it quick. I want to do more praying and less talking as much as I can, but it's important that you know some of the things that we've seen, and we're seeing it in the news now. We give all the glory to Jesus. All we do in word and in deed, we give all the glory to Jesus. All we say in word and in deed. I want to say this; I want to shout out somebody real quick. Brandon Brim, Billye Brim's grandson, is starting a church in Montecito, California. Tomorrow night is his first night to really have a church launch. I just think their family is amazing. They're seers; they see in the spirit, they flow with the gifts of the Spirit, and they walk with the authority of the believer. I really believe California needs a church like they're planning right now. So if you live in that area, it's going to be at the Hilton Santa Barbara Beachfront Hotel tomorrow night. I'm not exactly sure of the times; he did not text me the times, but I'm sure it's probably around 7 o'clock. I just wanted to encourage you all: if you live in that area, go out there and tell them I sent you. Okay, number two. Let's go right into what the Lord was showing us last night. There was a lot last night, wasn't there? And today in the news, some of it is already there. Now I want to show you about Xi Jinping. Do you see this? His top general? He's having trouble in his cabinet, just like we prayed last night. We were praying for disruption in the way they do things, and that it would bring a window of opportunity for the underground church—as all this distraction is taking place—for a major revival to be brought forth in China and all of Asia. But it was about Xi Jinping. And this is everything the Lord showed us last night in prayer. I just think it's amazing. Within a 24-hour period, we're already seeing stuff in the news. It's in turmoil. It says raising questions about Taiwan. And what did I tell you? I saw there were generals over here that were voting for it, and there were several of them. They were dressed just like that. And there were several over here like that. I saw Gavin Newsom slithering on his belly like a serpent with a suit on, going across the nation with a forked tongue. He was licking the dirt. His tongue was touching the dirt like a serpent would, looking for prey. But his face and his eyes were snake-like, and he looked demonically possessed as he was slithering across the nation. Gavin was surrounded with great black molasses, and he was in the middle of it, and there were ripples coming off of him of this darkness. I saw great darkness with the Pelosis. I saw San Francisco with great darkness and I saw the Pelosis, Kamala, and Schumer. And the Lord said specifically that because of health issues, there will be health issues. There are things that are about to happen, and I saw his days were numbered because of health things coming. Now, I don't know what that is; I didn't see into it. But the same thing happened when the Lord said we were praying for Ted Cruz. Does anybody remember that? This time last year, we were interceding for Ted Cruz and his colon specifically and his liver. The Lord said, 'Pray for his colon. Pray for his liver, Ted Cruz.' And this is the same thing we saw. He said to pray over it all going into this timeframe. So we will pray for him. Then we saw praying for President Trump, and everybody knows what the Lord showed us about President Trump. I truly believe, as I prayed for it all, even last night I sat on the couch and the Lord showed me it's not just about Greenland. It's about how he handles my land. It's how he handles Israel. How he handles this Gaza thing, how he touches the land and what he does with saying, 'Hey, we want to bring the Palestinian Authority, or whatever his name is, to give him counsel on this with a billion-dollar seat and how they handle the land of Israel.' This is the deciding factor of his presidency. How do you handle the land of Israel? How are you handling the decisions and what God has called you to do, sir, with the counsel that is being given to you from your son-in-law, Jared, to your vice president, JD Vance? This is a make-or-break concerning your presidency and your term, the Lord said, going clear into November and even with the red wave that everybody believes we have an opportunity to have—but it will not be. I've seen that we are just barely going to keep the House, that we lose the Senate and we barely keep the House. You say, 'Brandon, I told you by the Spirit of God how the election was going to go last time. I even told you how much we would win.' I said, 'We'll win the Senate and we'll win the House and this is what's going to happen.' But it would be barely. And these are the key states. Go back and watch the video. I even had the exact key states of where the trouble would be with the flip of how we would be able to obtain the Senate. I told you exactly the states that were there. Go watch it. And it was smack-dab on to a T, even how many seats. This is why I said, 'We're praying over the three. We're praying over this.' And I brought it up to you before the election even happened. I said, 'This is exactly what the Lord is showing us.' And I said Nevada, Arizona, and Pennsylvania; I said these are the key ones. I had video to prove it. And this is exactly—and it's all glory to God first and foremost—but it's exactly what the Lord said; it's accurate. And this is what the Lord's trying to tell you. We must pray for our Senate because I've seen it flipping blue. And we must pray that we keep the House because it will barely remain red. Can we change it? Yes. But it will take lots of prayer in the days ahead. And the decisions that he makes since the beginning of the month—he said over the next two weeks going into the third of February—there are major decisions that will be made, and the speech that he gives at the State of the Union will make or break the rest of his term. What he says and how he stands for things, and how he handles the nations concerning all—there are so many things—and how Iran, Cuba, Greenland, Israel, and Gaza. There's much pressure on him. Thank you, Holy Spirit. I love it when the anointing hits me like that; I feel it all over. It's the glory. So I just soak in it. I love it when I feel him. He fills me and he fills my cup. I'm so grateful and I acknowledge you. We yield to the anointing of the prophetic on this channel and we give all glory to Jesus. So that's what we're trying to tell you. Great corruption will be exposed in the days ahead concerning Gavin Newsom. Great corruption will be exposed concerning the Pelosis and Schumer. And the Lord said, even Kamala Harris, he said, there's great corruption. There's deeper, darker corruption than there is in Minnesota. I saw it coming through. I saw police officers, I saw people being paid off by drug cartels and big money. And that's where I'll leave that because of sister clipboards. But what else? Depression from the last six months on the border. I don't want to touch that no more because you saw Booker. Yes, Booker. I saw Booker trying to rise up. I saw Gavin trying to—and that's when Gavin was slithering like a snake. And you see his tongue, and it was forked. He was licking the dirt as he was trying to go across the nation. But he was slithering like this, and that's usually how a demon-possessed person does. And then I saw Macron, and he was on some kind of black surface that was cracking all around him, and there was fire coming up around him. He said, 'He's closer to hell than you realize.' I thought that was interesting—'He's closer to hell than you realize.' That's what the Lord said. And I saw dark people rising up around him, for they wanted to create Agenda 2030. Trump has been a roadblock trying to stop Agenda 2030 from coming into full manifestation, coming against the WHO and the EU and all the things because of what they want to do with digital ID to suppress and oppress the people. And the Lord said, 'Do you not see? This is what I warned you about, son—about being the roadblock in the road, the big log in the road, keeping the roadblock in the road.' And this is why I've had his decisions that he makes. 'Son, do you understand how important it is?' He said, 'That's why I told you I hold the church accountable for what's about to take place. You must pray, church, more than we've ever prayed before.' This is a time that we rise up as believers and prayer warriors and stand as watchmen in the gap and fill that gap with prayer. Even today, what was he saying when we were driving around? Did Mama write all that down? She didn't have time, did she? Well, he said, 'Greater the prayer, greater the glory.' He said you'll see it even in Tulsa. He said the greater the prayer covering, the greater the glory will manifest. This is why there'll be much migration with churches in the days ahead. He said it will not be considered equal everywhere. The greater the prayer, the greater the glory. The greater the manifestation of intercessory prayer over that area, the greater the manifestations of the glory over that area. And he said, 'This is why Tulsa, Oklahoma will be a hot spot because there are great wells of prayer that are still there from even the elders that know how to pray—from the Kenneth Hagin, the Hagins, and Oral Roberts and so on—from all of the great revival and word-based, faith-based prayer that have been here since the 70s and before, right from Oral Roberts University and all that.' And that's what the Lord was saying: you'll see mass migration of Christians in the days ahead, for great revival will come where there's great prayer. That's why it was in Tennessee. That's why it's around Mobile, I believe, with Pastor John Kilpatrick in Alabama. I believe it's Bill, but they know how to pray and revival begins with prayer. Everything is always cultivated with prayer. And that's why this channel exists: prayer, prayer, prayer. Foundation. And it was neat yesterday when I saw Jesus in that vision as I was walking, and his foot in prayer was making indentations in the spirit realm as we were walking, not behind him, but beside him as a child would their father. We don't look at ourselves as broken and humble like, 'Oh Lord, we're humble and we're broken,' but we're joint-heirs with Jesus. Don't act like, 'Oh, I'm beat down, I'm a child.' No, I'm like, 'Oh, Daddy, how are you doing today? Let me tell you about my day, Father.' 'Oh, tell me about your day.' That's communion. That's fellowship. And that was whenever we were seeing them walking, not like whenever you see the sand on the beach and he says, 'Well, where are my footprints? That's when I was carrying you.' We were walking beside him and we were making indentations in the spirit realm as we were walking with footprints like it is in the snow. And I saw an indentation of the glory as we were pushing in the glory with the Father. As he is, so are we in this world, and we were walking side by side with him in the spirit realm. And that's what he said: 'This is a higher level of prayer.' As I was praying today, I saw us trying—He said, 'Come up! Come up to the throne. Come up higher.' And there were things trying to grab ahold of us to pull us down. They were grabbing ahold of our feet, trying to pull you out of those cloud banks. He said, 'Come up above it. Come up above the clouds. Kick those things off that try to hold you back, son.' He was talking to me and Diana. 'Kick those things, the pricks, the things that come against you. Come up to the throne of God.' As I was driving, he said, 'Come up, come up, son. You've got to kick those things off. They're trying to grab ahold of your feet. Don't allow them.' So I say that to you. Don't allow the things of this world to hold your feet down. Come up higher into the throne of God. Come up higher above the clouds. It's time to soar like the eagles in these last days. But things of this world—emails or whatever you might face during the day—try to hold your feet down. They try to hold you back. Life circumstances, ailments with your flesh, financial pressure—you name it—try to hold you down because it's carnal thinking. It tries to get you to think carnally, but you've got to come up higher and renew your mind by the word of God. And he said, 'Come up, come up.' And as I was driving, I could see the little things trying to latch onto the heel of my foot, trying to pull me down out of that cloud bank with life circumstances. But he said, 'You must kick them off and fly above it, for I've called you to soar like an eagle. Yield to the anointing that I've put upon your life.' Say it right now: I yield to the anointing that God has placed on my life. I yield to it. I don't put a wall up toward it anymore. I'm yielded to what God has for me. I surrender all to what God has for me. That's what you've got to do. I surrender to the prophetic. I surrender to the watchman call. I surrender to the healing manifestations flowing through me. Don't be a wall; be a river that lets the Holy Spirit flow through you. So that whenever you are in those circumstances of life and the storms are blowing, it doesn't bother you because I'm soaring above the storm. I'm coming up higher in prayer. I'm coming up higher with my fellowship with him. And I saw them keep trying to pull me down—demonic forces, things try to pull you out of that cloud bank. 'Oh well, they said this about you. Oh well, this happened to you. Oh well, you've got this going.' And they try to pull you out of that. I'm going to remain focused, going vertical and not horizontal. I'm staying vertical on him tonight. And that's what you've got to do. I'm trying to tell you all what I try to do. 'Well, didn't you see this? Didn't you see?' I don't care. I'm staying vertical. I'm staying with him far above all principalities and powers according to Ephesians. I believe, Father, that you've made a way for me. No matter how much I kick these things off, I refuse to allow strife in. I refuse to allow people to be a Debbie Downer in my life. I'm not going to have Debbie Downers, Brandon. 'Well, you say a lot of things that are hard and there seem to be Debbie Downer.' I'm not a Debbie Downer. I'm trying to tell you what I'm seeing by the spirit of God as I'm flying above and looking across the edge of the horizon of time. Say, 'Hey, if you come on board and we pray for this, we can change this.' I'm holding the church accountable. What happens in America and what happens in these places is up to the church. Take your authority, church. Take your authority. I'm not going to do anything else about the devil; I've already done it all. I said, 'It is finished.' Do you ever remember Brother Hagin talking about the encounter he had with Jesus? Listen, I've got to be quick; I'm talking too much. The devil was there, and this devil was flapping his hands. If you go back and hear the 'Authority of the Believer' sermon series he had—he had a visitation from the Lord and was talking—all of a sudden this devil came out and started making noise. He was so frustrated because Jesus wouldn't do anything about the devil and he couldn't hear what the Lord was saying because the devil was making such a loud noise by his feet. He was like, 'Oh, I wish the Lord would do something about this devil.' Jesus was talking the whole time and he couldn't hear anything He was saying because He wouldn't take care of that devil for him. So, Brother Hagin said in the vision, 'In the name of Jesus, devil, get out of here! Shut up and go!' That devil took off and got out of there. He said, 'Why didn't You do anything about it?' Jesus said, 'I couldn't do anything about it.' He said, 'What do you mean You couldn't?' He said, 'I don't think I heard You correctly,' and they kept arguing back and forth. Basically, the bottom line is if he wouldn't take his authority and tell that devil to get out of here—Jesus already did it, and it took us to do it. The bottom line is that Christ gave you authority over the devil, and Jesus is not going to do any more about the devil. You're going to have to stand up against him with the sword of the Spirit and tell him, as James 4:7 says, 'Submit yourself therefore unto God, resist the devil and he will flee.' If you don't do that, he's going to sit there and nip at your feet. That's why I tell you all the time to take your authority. That's why I have Sister Billye's books and we keep them all around. I've got them everywhere so that you understand the power of the authority of the believer. It's important because the Lord's not going to do anything else about the devil. He gave you power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt you. Is that literal? I believe it's literal and metaphorical. I believe that Jesus gave me power and authority over the principalities and all of it concerning me and my house. I don't go around binding everything else out here or going into neighborhoods binding the devil and the principality over Tulsa. No, concerning me and my house, you have no power in my house. I pray over my president and my neighborhood, but I don't go to your house and start binding the principality of Persia and being stupid. I take authority over my house, my children, my wife, my finances, and my church. I pray over my pastors and our leaders, that You give them fresh revelation knowledge to teach the body of Christ. We pray over our leaders and we flow in that gift. Lord said, 'Keep it shorter. Pray more.' Father, we thank You for the body. We thank You, Lord, for all that You've done for us. We thank You that by Your stripes we are healed. We're so grateful for tongues and the interpretation of tongues. We're so grateful for the gifts of the Spirit, that we walk in divine healing and health. We walk in the authority of the believer and nothing shall by any means hurt us. A thousand shall fall at our side and ten thousand at our right hand, but it shall not come nigh us. I believe for Psalm 91 to become a revelation in my life. I thank You, Lord, that I have eyes to see what You see and ears to hear what the Spirit is saying. Father, I thank You that I am filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit. We yield to the anointing of wealth, the prophetic, healing, deliverance, peace, and joy, and all the fruit of the Spirit: love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, gentleness, and self-control. Holy Spirit, flood my life with Your goodness and Your mercy. Goodness and mercy will follow me all the days of my life and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever. Father, we thank You for this body and all You've done for us. We walk in divine health and nothing shall by any means hurt us in Jesus' name. Lord, we thank You for the blood. We make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. I thank You, Father, that if we confess our sins, You are faithful and just to forgive us and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. We plead the blood of Jesus over anything You show us. We thank You, Lord, that we only see what You want us to see, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I plead the blood of Jesus Christ over my spiritual and natural eyes. We are led by the Spirit of God. We tell our flesh to shut up. Father, I thank You for the blood that never loses its power, covering my family and even our dogs. We're so grateful that You've redeemed us and made us whole. We take this blood right now in Jesus' mighty name. Amen. Jesus Christ loves you. I'm not about religion; I'm about Jesus and a relationship. I want a God I can talk to and be friends with. Sister Billye just texted me. Father, I thank You for this night. I exalt Thee, oh Lord. For Thou, Lord, art high above all the earth; Thou art exalted far above all gods. There are no other gods; they're all just made-up devils. They just changed the lyrics of that song. Isn't that interesting? I love the song, but I don't like that verse. Father, we just thank you, Lord. There is no God before you. You are the only God. Everything else is just a demonic spirit trying to pretend. You are the Great I Am That I Am, and I'm so thankful that you dwell on the inside of me. I'm so grateful for all that you've called us to do. Father, I'm so grateful that you chose us and you say, 'Hey, I can trust you.' And I, Father, I'm so grateful, for the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth looking for a heart who's perfect toward you. I thank you, Lord, that our hearts are somewhere you do not have to look anymore. You look at us and you say, 'I see that they are ready.' Father, I thank you, Lord, that we're yielded by the spirit of God. For those that are called sons of God, those are led by the spirit of God. For those that are led by the spirit of God are the sons of God. And I thank you that we are led by the spirit of God. We're led by your spirit. For those that are led by the spirit of God, they are the sons and daughters of God. And tonight, we lift up our president before you. We lift up this need of the nation as he is in the valley of decision again. And you said this would be the make or break of the presidency. Lord, I don't know what kind of decisions he's making, but you said it. So, Father, we lift him up before you and we thank you, Lord, that he takes no counsel from the wicked. Father, we would be on that straight and narrow path. I thank you, Lord, that we would hear you and we would follow you, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. And that's concerning even our president. We lift up this time before you, Father, in prayer. And we believe, Father, that your hand is on them and upon the cabinet. I see Marco Rubio before me right now. There's an anointing coming on Marco Rubio right now. Something is shifting with Marco Rubio. There is a glory coming on Marco Rubio. I see like a light shining on him and I see a heart that has become pliable before the Lord. Oh, a meekness. A meekness. Oh Lord, praises to your name, oh Lord. Oh, I can hear him singing, 'For your name is great and greatly to be praised.' I sing praises to your name, oh Lord. Praises to your name, oh Lord, for your name is great and greatly to be praised. I sing praises to your name, oh Lord. Praises to your name, oh Lord. I'll describe what I hear. I hear echoes upon waters and their voices that are singing in heaven. And it sounds like there are octaves, but they're all blending into one. As I hear them singing this, it fills the atmosphere and I can smell the fragrance of it. They're all blending into one voice, but they're different octaves, but they're one sound. There's not like a choir you can hear, and I don't want to leave it. I hear them. Oh Jesus. It sounds like a sound of water, but it floats. It all blends into one. One sound, one voice, but many different voices that blend into one, singing: 'I sing praises to your name, oh Lord. Praises to your name, oh Lord, for your name is great and greatly to be praised. I sing praises to your name, oh Lord. Praises to your name, oh Lord.' And what's amazing about it is there's these beautiful pink swirls with beautiful, beautiful colors. They look like song notes, but they're rippling like you would see animation for the wind, and it's being carried on the wind. It comes in and comes out. You know how you feel the wind and it wisps, it whispers. You know, you can feel, you can hear it, but there's no end and there's no beginning to it. It's just there. And the sound is being carried upon the river like that. It's worship and the sound is carrying. I don't know how to describe it with words, but I could hear it. It sounded like 'Holy, holy, holy is the Lord.' That's what it sounded like. But beautiful. The very atmosphere is charged with worship. Wherever I'm at right now, when I was there five seconds ago, I could see it so clear. You know, we wonder why so many don't come back when we ask them to after being raised from the dead. Because once you taste that glory, there's nothing in this world that you would ever want to come back to. That instant what I just had for that split second was beautiful. Heaven is so real. It's just one breath away. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. And then when you are a believing believer and you step over into that glory, no wonder nobody wants to come back. We say we can raise the dead, but they fight. They fight with everything, saying 'I don't want to come back to that.' You know that little boy—Heaven is for Real, you know. And he's like, 'Are you kidding me?' when you step over there and you just have that one little glimpse, like I just got to touch it for a second for whatever reason. The sound is carried and it's endless, but they're all one voice worshiping the Father and it's purples and beautiful pinks. It's so strange. You know what? I have these visitations. I usually am off camera and I can grasp it. But when there's 7,000 people watching you, it's kind of different when he comes and visits. Heaven is getting so close. Heaven is becoming so real. Jesus Christ is coming. And there's so many people that are asleep. I tried to warn you. He's standing at the door and there's so many people that are not ready for what's about to take place. There's so many people that are not ready for what's coming to America and these countries around the world. It's so important that you have a relationship with Jesus. Well, you say, 'Brother Brandon, I don't have a relationship like you do.' I've tried to tell you a thousand times I'm nothing special. I just decided to follow him. I chose to seek him just like you do anything. How bad do you want it in your life? It's not just going to happen. You're looking for a microwave, but everything in the spirit is not a microwave. Well, Brandon, you do two-hour prayer. This is nothing. This is my life. It costs a lot, but once you can push through that veil, he visits all the time and he has relationship with me. But it started out with nothing. I chose to fast. I chose to seek him and listen to tapes and follow him and clean and do what he asked me to do even when my flesh didn't want to do it. Stay at this house 20 years in a rat-shack house. Do what I ask you to do. Sit before the dryer and pray five hours a night, six hours a night. Sit there and leave your family. I want you to do this. You sit there and you listen. You sit in the cold. But I just sit and I make a place for him. How do you do that? I cultivate his presence. I keep a place for him in my heart and keep right before him by repenting. I am in a place of communion all around me. I have buckets of them. You say, 'Well, I only do that once in a while.' I take it all the time. I got them in my car. I got them in my living room. I've got them in my bathroom. I got communion everywhere. Why? Because in case I need it, I cultivate his presence. I teach my kids to do the same thing. My little girl, my boy, my wife, we just pursue him with all we have. But you have the same opportunity as me. Everybody has the opportunity to find books to read. It's like Diana said: 'Brendan, we should just spend today—don't go on live. Let's spend the day reading and doing things together,' because that's where we find Him. Reading Robert's book, 'The Ultimate Voice'—we want to go to the next level; we're not satisfied with here. This is wonderful, but I know there's more. There's more. If the angels can go around His throne and see something new every single time for eons and eons, 'Holy, holy, holy is the Lord of hosts,' because they're seeing a new revelation, a new glimpse of the glory. And that came out of John Bevere's book. He's talking about it grabbing hold of people that want something deep and intimate with Him. Finding books that would inspire you, like 'The Awe of God.' Finding books that challenge your flesh to shut up because He's not going to yell. He's that still small voice. And you have so much clutter from the world outside of you that you can't hear Him. Turn up His volume and turn down yours. And the only way you're going to do that is by sitting at His feet. In the car, praying—I told Diana I was so tired of all the snow today. I said, 'Let's just drive in the snow. Put our SUV in gear and we'll drive around and we'll do the best we can. I've got to get out and pray over the city.' So I pray; it's a habit for me. It's probably as much as what somebody would say: 'I crave a salad.' Not me—my flesh, you can see—but I crave Him. He deals with all the other stuff. He corrects; He corrects those He loves. I would say if you're not being corrected, I would check my walk with Him. He corrects me more than I think He does a lot of people. I told Diana, 'I walk a very thin noodle with the Lord' with who I talk to and my conversations on the phone, everything. I get off and I get corrected. I walk a very fine line. The wider the road, the more He's not influencing. I feel the smaller the noodle—you're walking on a thin string.
